sources.title: ASME Y14.5-2018 (R2024), Dimensioning and Tolerancing
sources.license: Purchase or licensed access required; no standard text is stored here.
sources.use: Authoritative GD&T source after the project obtains licensed access.

sources.title: ISO 273:1979, Fasteners - Clearance holes for bolts and screws
sources.license: Licensed standard; catalogue metadata only is stored here.
sources.use: Authoritative source for general-purpose clearance-hole series.

sources.title: ISO 2768-1:1989, General tolerances - Part 1
sources.license: Licensed standard; do not copy tables into this repository.
sources.use: Reference for unindicated linear and angular tolerances after scope review.

sources.title: Digital Thread for Manufacturing
sources.publisher: National Institute of Standards and Technology
sources.license: Use the source page and linked materials according to their terms.
sources.use: Architecture reference for traceable product, manufacturing, and quality data.

sources.title: NASA-STD-5001B, Structural Design and Test Factors of Safety for Spaceflight Hardware
sources.license: Work of the US Government, public domain. Requirement text is quoted verbatim in nasa_rules.json with section and page provenance.
sources.use: Normative source for structural design and test factors of safety requirements. Applies to NASA spaceflight hardware; confirm applicability before citing it as a constraint on non-NASA hardware.
